title: fagara kellermanii
intro: Fagara kellermanii, also known as the Kellerman's pepper or Kellerman's prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve pain. The health benefits of Fagara kellermanii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Fagara kellermanii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
